title: EnerGizeXP
description: Energy-to-Experience Points Conversion Mod for Minecraft 1.12.2. Convert energy into XP fluid.
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1310213/description_f4fe4ae9-28f0-43b9-94c1-758d7394d773.png)

# **EnerGizeXP**

Transform your RF energy into liquid XP with this efficient mod for Minecraft 1.12.2!

## **🌟 What it does**

**EnerGizeXP** adds a comprehensive XP conversion system that lets you turn your excess RF/FE energy into precious liquid experience. Perfect for automating your enchanting setups or storing XP for later use!

### **⚡ XP Conversion Machines**

Choose from three powerful tiers of XP converters, each more efficient than the last: (_1 cycle = 10 ticks_)

*   **Basic XP Converter**: 400 XP capacity, 25,000 RF storage, 2 XP per cycle, 300 RF per cycle
*   **Advanced XP Converter**: 800 XP capacity, 40,000 RF storage, 5 XP per cycle, 600 RF per cycle
*   **Elite XP Converter**: 1,600 XP capacity, 55,000 RF storage, 12 XP per cycle, 1,200 RF per cycle

Each machine features a custom GUI with animated progress indicators and helpful energy/XP status bars.

### **🧪 Universal Fluid XP System**

The mod creates a universal XP fluid that's compatible with multiple existing XP fluid types from other popular mods:

*   `liquid_xp`, `xpjuice`, `essence`, `mobessence`, `experience`, `fluid_experience`
*   Automatically transfers XP fluid to adjacent machines
*   Click the XP button in the GUI to extract XP directly as orbs!

### **⛏️ Lead Processing Chain**

Adds a complete lead ore processing system:

*   **Lead Ore**: Spawns naturally in the world between Y levels 10-40
*   **Lead Ingots**: Smelt lead ore to get ingots
*   **Lead Blocks**: Craft decorative lead blocks
*   **Mekanism Compatibility**: Full enrichment chamber support for 2x ore processing

### **🔧 Machine Components**

*   **Machine Casing**: Durable iron-tier blocks for your industrial builds
*   **Iron Gears**: Essential crafting components

## **🎮 Features**

✨ **Three progression tiers** with increasing capacity and efficiency  
✨ **Animated GUI** with real-time energy and XP monitoring  
✨ **Universal compatibility** with existing XP fluid mods  
✨ **Automatic fluid transfer** to adjacent machines  
✨ **Direct XP extraction** as experience orbs  
✨ **Complete lead processing** with world generation  
✨ **Mekanism integration** for advanced ore processing

## **⚙️ Technical Details**

*   **Minecraft Version**: 1.12.2
*   **Mod Loader**: Minecraft Forge
*   **Dependencies**: None required, Mekanism optional

The mod uses advanced tile entity systems with proper capability integration for both energy (RF/FE) and fluid handling, ensuring compatibility with most tech mods.

Perfect for modpack makers looking to add balanced energy-to-XP conversion, or players who want to automate their enchanting operations.
